description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a flat roof and an open-plan layout centered around a large backyard pool. The structure features expansive glass doors and windows, allowing for abundant natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The exterior walls are predominantly white, complemented by green lawn areas and a wooden deck surrounding the pool. The house includes multiple rooms, such as bedrooms, a living area, kitchen, and bathrooms, all arranged around the central pool and patio. Palm trees and minimal landscaping add a touch of luxury and relaxation to the outdoor space. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a central pool surrounded by a wooden deck and green lawn. The design features open spaces and a seamless indoor-outdoor flow.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the rear, highlighting the pool, wooden deck, and open living spaces facing the backyard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side perspective, revealing the pool, palm trees, and the arrangement of rooms along the length of the house.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front facade with large glass doors, a green lawn, and the main entryway leading into the open-plan living area.
description_view_3: View 3 offers an angled view from the opposite side, showcasing the pool, deck, and the distribution of rooms around the outdoor area.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and sliding glass doors in asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features large glass doors with a minimal overhang, flush with the lawn and deck, emphasizing openness and accessibility.
